name: Strawberry-Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions: In a bowl, combine sugar, flour, nutmeg and cinnamon. Add strawberries and pecans; toss gently. Line pie plate with bottom crust. Add filling; dot with butter. Top with a lattice crust. Bake at 375 degrees for 50 minutes or until crust is golden brown and filling is bubbly.
